mapper.update: MERGE INTO USER_COFFEE_CHAT_SETTING setting USING ( SELECT #{userId} AS USER_ID, #{emailNotifyYn} AS EMAIL_NOTIFY_YN FROM DUAL ) source ON (setting.USER_ID = source.USER_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET setting.EMAIL_NOTIFY_YN = source.EMAIL_NOTIFY_YN, setting.UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( USER_ID, EMAIL_NOTIFY_YN, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( source.USER_ID, source.EMAIL_NOTIFY_YN, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT u.USER_ID AS userId, u.NAME AS name, u.EMAIL AS email, department.DEPARTMENT_NAME AS departmentName, job.JOB_NAME AS jobName, position.POSITION_NAME AS positionName, u.KCY_RESULT AS kcyResult, NVL(setting.EMAIL_NOTIFY_YN, 'N') AS emailNotifyYn FROM USERS u LEFT JOIN USER_COFFEE_CHAT_SETTING setting ON setting.USER_ID = u.USER_ID LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT department ON department.DEPARTMENT_ID = u.DEPARTMENT_ID LEFT JOIN JOB job ON job.JOB_ID = u.JOB_ID LEFT JOIN POSITION position ON position.POSITION_ID = u.POSITION_ID WHERE u.USER_ID = #{userId} AND u.STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO KCY_COFFEE_CHAT_REQUEST ( COFFEE_CHAT_REQUEST_ID, REQUESTER_USER_ID, RECEIVER_USER_ID, REQUESTER_KCY_CODE, RECEIVER_KCY_CODE, MATCH_GRADE, MESSAGE, STATUS, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{requestId}, #{requesterUserId}, #{receiverUserId}, #{requesterKcyCode}, #{receiverKcyCode}, #{matchGrade}, #{message}, #{status}, SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO MAIL_SEND_LOG ( MAIL_LOG_ID, REQUEST_ID, RECEIVER_USER_ID, TO_EMAIL, SUBJECT, CONTENT, SEND_STATUS, ERROR_MESSAGE, CREATED_AT, SENT_AT ) VALUES ( #{mailLogId}, #{requestId}, #{receiverUserId}, #{toEmail}, #{subject}, #{content}, #{sendStatus}, #{errorMessage, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, CASE WHEN #{sendStatus} = 'SENT' THEN SYSDATE ELSE NULL END )
mapper.update: UPDATE MAIL_SEND_LOG SET SEND_STATUS = #{sendStatus}, ERROR_MESSAGE = #{errorMessage, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SENT_AT = CASE WHEN #{sendStatus} = 'SENT' THEN SYSDATE ELSE SENT_AT END WHERE MAIL_LOG_ID = #{mailLogId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT request.COFFEE_CHAT_REQUEST_ID AS requestId, receiver.USER_ID AS partnerUserId, receiver.NAME AS partnerName, department.DEPARTMENT_NAME AS partnerDepartmentName, position.POSITION_NAME AS partnerPositionName, request.REQUESTER_KCY_CODE AS requesterKcyCode, request.RECEIVER_KCY_CODE AS receiverKcyCode, request.MATCH_GRADE AS matchGrade, request.MESSAGE AS message, request.STATUS AS status, TO_CHAR(request.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS createdAt FROM KCY_COFFEE_CHAT_REQUEST request JOIN USERS receiver ON receiver.USER_ID = request.RECEIVER_USER_ID LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT department ON department.DEPARTMENT_ID = receiver.DEPARTMENT_ID LEFT JOIN POSITION position ON position.POSITION_ID = receiver.POSITION_ID WHERE request.REQUESTER_USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY request.CREATED_AT DESC, request.COFFEE_CHAT_REQUEST_ID DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT request.COFFEE_CHAT_REQUEST_ID AS requestId, requester.USER_ID AS partnerUserId, requester.NAME AS partnerName, department.DEPARTMENT_NAME AS partnerDepartmentName, position.POSITION_NAME AS partnerPositionName, request.REQUESTER_KCY_CODE AS requesterKcyCode, request.RECEIVER_KCY_CODE AS receiverKcyCode, request.MATCH_GRADE AS matchGrade, request.MESSAGE AS message, request.STATUS AS status, TO_CHAR(request.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS createdAt FROM KCY_COFFEE_CHAT_REQUEST request JOIN USERS requester ON requester.USER_ID = request.REQUESTER_USER_ID LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT department ON department.DEPARTMENT_ID = requester.DEPARTMENT_ID LEFT JOIN POSITION position ON position.POSITION_ID = requester.POSITION_ID WHERE request.RECEIVER_USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY request.CREATED_AT DESC, request.COFFEE_CHAT_REQUEST_ID DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5
